title: Launching a Career in Customer Success at Salesforce Through Futureforce
author: Salesforce Careers

classification.rationale: Rule-based: inspiring intent detected in 'Introduction'. Products: service_cloud. Funnel: awareness.

existing_cta.heading: We can’t wait to meet you!
existing_cta.body: Join our Talent Community and be the first to know about open roles, career tips, events happening near you, and much more.

issues: Product alignment is partial — a more targeted CTA may perform better
existing_cta_score.rationale: CTA targets consideration-stage readers; section is awareness-stage. Product alignment: partial.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Introduction — let the reader engage with the content before presenting a CTA.

cta_health_issues: No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
Multiple CTAs crowding the top of the article.
CTAs in 100% of sections. This is CTA spam — research shows it reduces engagement 15-20%.
